ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tweet */,
  "author_id" TEXT /* ID of the author who posted the tweet */,
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* ID of the conversation thread the tweet belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Count of likes received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Count of quotes made from the tweet */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Count of replies to the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Count of retweets received */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* User ID of the tweet this tweet is a reply to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source platform used to post the tweet */,
  "reply_settings" TEXT /* Settings for reply permissions (e.g., everyone, followers) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "entities" TEXT /* Entities mentioned in the tweet (e.g., URLs, hashtags, users) */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "urls" TEXT /* URLs mentioned in the tweet */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media attached to the tweet (e.g., image, video) */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is pinned by the author */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is a retweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Profile description of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the user account */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Count of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Count of accounts the user follows */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Count of lists the user has been added to */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Count of tweets posted by the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "header_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's header image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the conversation thread */,
  "first_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the first tweet in the conversation */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the conversation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conversation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conversation */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the conversation */,
  "num_tweets" INTEGER /* Number of tweets in the conversation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the engagement metrics record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet associated with the metrics */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes received by the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets received by the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been viewed */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the tweet (e.g., likes + retweets + replies / impressions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the mention record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet where the mention occurs */,
  "mentioned_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being mentioned */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., username, hashtag, keyword) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sources" (
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source platform (e.g., Twitter for iPhone, Twitter Web Client) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "lang_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the language */,
  "lang_code" TEXT /* Code representing the language (e.g., en for English) */,
  "lang_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lang_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reply_settings" (
  "setting_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the reply setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the reply setting (e.g., everyone, followers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "user_engagement_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user engagement record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who engaged with the tweet */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that was engaged with */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, retweet, reply) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the hashtag record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that contains the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_type" TEXT /* Type of hashtag (e.g., branded, non-branded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the media record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that the media is attached to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "media_height" INTEGER /* Height of the media (in pixels) */,
  "media_width" INTEGER /* Width of the media (in pixels) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the URL record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that mentions the URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL mentioned in the tweet */,
  "url_title" TEXT /* Title of the URL */,
  "url_description" TEXT /* Description of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the poll record */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that contains the poll */,
  "poll_question" TEXT /* Question asked in the poll */,
  "poll_options" TEXT /* Options available in the poll */,
  "pollvotes" INTEGER /* Number of votes in the poll */,
  "poll_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_follower_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user follower record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is being followed */,
  "follower_id" TEXT /* ID of the follower */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_following" (
  "user_following_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user following record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_following_following_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_lists" (
  "list_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the list record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the list */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the list */,
  "list_description" TEXT /* Description of the list */,
  "list_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the list was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_lists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "list_members" (
  "list_member_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the list member record */,
  "list_id" TEXT /* ID of the list that the user is a member of */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the member */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_members_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES user_lists ("list_id")
)
